semantic.role: Centralized version definition module for ArchSpine schema and package versioning.
responsibilities: Defines the SchemaVersion type alias as a semantic version string template.
Exports constants for the current package, schema, and config schema versions.
Exports a generator version string identifying the ArchSpine toolchain.
Provides a type guard function to validate config schema version compatibility.
outOfScope: Any side effects or runtime logic beyond type checking.
invariants: Version constants must be exported immutably.
SchemaVersion type alias must follow the semantic version template.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Establish a single source of truth for all version-related constants and types within the ArchSpine ecosystem.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Part of ArchSpine v1.0.0 release, consolidating version definitions for schema, config, and generator.

English.role: Centralized version definition module for ArchSpine schema and package versioning.
responsibilities: Defines the SchemaVersion type alias as a semantic version string template.
Exports constants for the current package, schema, and config schema versions.
Exports a generator version string identifying the ArchSpine toolchain.
Provides a type guard function to validate config schema version compatibility.
outOfScope: Any side effects or runtime logic beyond type checking.

Simplified Chinese.role: ArchSpine 架构的版本定义核心模块，用于管理 Schema 和包版本。
responsibilities: 定义 SchemaVersion 类型别名，格式为语义版本字符串模板。
导出当前包版本、Schema 版本和配置 Schema 版本的常量。
导出标识 ArchSpine 工具链的生成器版本字符串。
提供类型守卫函数，用于验证配置 Schema 版本的兼容性。
outOfScope: 除类型检查外的任何副作用或运行时逻辑。
